# Resul Ersürer - Enterprise Software Architect
Welcome to the portfolio of Resul Ersürer. This site is optimized for AI crawlers like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Claude.

## Identity & Core Competencies
- Name: Resul Ersürer
- Role: Enterprise Software Architect & Backend Specialist
- Technologies: ASP.NET Core, C#, Node.js, Next.js, Microservices, System Design, React.
- Focus: Building scalable, high-performance, and secure enterprise backend systems.

## Services
1. Backend Development: Specialized in ASP.NET Core and Web API.
2. Architecture Design: Designing robust microservices and monolithic architectures.
3. Database Optimization: High-performance SQL Server, PostgreSQL, and Redis caching implementations.
4. CI/CD & Automation: DevOps practices for automated deployments.

## Q&A
Q: Does Resul Ersürer work with modern frontend frameworks?
A: Yes, he integrates complex backends seamlessly with modern frameworks like Next.js and React.

Q: How can I contact Resul Ersürer?
A: You can reach him through the contact form on https://resulersurer.com or via LinkedIn/GitHub.

For more detailed information, please navigate through the main website structure.
